name: free-claude-code
description: A lightweight proxy that routes Claude Code's Anthropic API calls to NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, or llama.cpp for free usage

lm_studio.best_for: Privacy, offline use, no rate limits

key_features: Zero cost - 40 req/min free on NVIDIA NIM
5 providers - NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, llama.cpp
Per-model mapping - Route Opus/Sonnet/Haiku to different models
Thinking token support - Parses reasoning_content into Claude thinking blocks
Heuristic tool parser - Auto-parses text tool calls into structured tool use
Request optimization - 5 categories of trivial calls intercepted locally
Smart rate limiting - Rolling window throttle + 429 exponential backoff
Discord/Telegram Bot - Remote autonomous coding with tree-based threading
Subagent control - Task tool interception prevents runaway subagents

project_structure.api: FastAPI routes, request detection, optimization handlers
project_structure.providers: BaseProvider, OpenAICompatibleProvider, NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, llamacpp
project_structure.messaging: MessagingPlatform ABC + Discord/Telegram bots, session management
